human_actions_pending.action: Open DevTools → Network → tick 'Disable cache' → reload → Finance Collectibles → approve/reject a billing request → check bell notification
human_actions_pending.context: Browser was caching old finance.js so be8afbc hadn't run yet when last tested. With cache disabled, new DECIDED notifications will have source_id=project_code. The renderer (228f4b7) also now suppresses auto-IDs so old broken notifications look clean immediately.

decisions.decision: Executed inline sequentially on v3.3 (no subagents/worktrees)
decisions.rationale: gsd-sdk unavailable on this machine + 2 stale LOCKED agent worktrees make the worktree/subagent path unsafe; matches Phase 98/91.3 precedent

decisions.decision: Own-requests listener scoped to currentProject.project_code via idempotent ensureBillingRequestsListener()
decisions.rationale: The URL projectCode param can be a Firestore doc id (Phase 78 D-06 clientless fallback) that differs from project_code, which is the field submit writes

decisions.decision: Billing-type pills inlined as literal _selectBillingType('progress'|'completion'|'other') calls
decisions.rationale: A DRY pill(type) helper interpolated ${type} so the literal strings the acceptance criteria grep for were absent; inlining matches the contract

decisions.decision: Auto-ID suppression added to notification renderer (/^[A-Za-z0-9]{15,}$/)
decisions.rationale: Human-readable IDs always contain dashes (MRF-2026-014, CLMC-BRIDGE-001); Firestore auto-IDs never do. Belt-and-suspenders fix that also cleans up already-written bugged notifications.

decisions.decision: billedIndices guard added to openBillingRequestModal() — disables already-pending/approved tranches
decisions.rationale: UAT gap: modal showed all tranches including ones with active billing requests. rejected is re-submittable.

next_action: Re-verify UAT test 6 with DevTools cache disabled. If clean, mark Phase 99 complete in ROADMAP + STATE. See 99-HUMAN-UAT.md for full test log.
context_notes: Phase 99 (Billing Request Flow) is fully EXECUTED — all 8 original tasks + 3 UAT gap fixes committed (a5902d6, be8afbc, 228f4b7). Tests 1-5 PASS. Test 6 (notifications) is PARTIAL: the display bug was caused by browser caching old finance.js; fixes are committed and the renderer now suppresses raw auto-IDs as belt-and-suspenders. Single remaining action: re-verify test 6 with cache disabled, then mark phase complete. Other open loops: merge v3.3 -> main + firebase deploy --only firestore:rules (Phase 87.4 pending); Phase 86.9 Plan 03 browser UAT.
